title: aglaonema marantifolium var. commutatum
intro: Aglaonema marantifolium var. commutatum, also known as the Red Aglaonema or Philippine Aglaonema, is a variety of the Aglaonema plant species, which is a type of evergreen perennial native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of the Aglaonema plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of consuming the plant include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of Aglaonema marantifolium var. commutatum typically involve extracting its leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
